description: Composition Navy blue trousers made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures, belt loops on the waist, reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area, snipped edged hem that can be altered according to convenience, a zipper and button closure and embroidered branding at the side of the right front pocket Fit Slim-fit Wash care Normal machine wash with like colours in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or dry clean Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Crafted from a polyester/viscose blended fabric, this pair of trousers from the arrow Premium Collection is lightweight and comfortable. The fine tailoring ensures an excellent fit, offering a flattering silhouette and making it an essential addition to your formal wardrobe. Pair it with a formal shirt and leather shoes. Model statistics Product is a size 32, length 41.5&rdquo on a model of height 6' and waist 32&rdquo
